prompt:
Use case: identity-preserve
Asset type: runtime tactics unit sprite
Primary request: regenerate this wild archer as a cleaner runtime battle sprite
Subject: the same falcon archer with a moss-green cloak, auburn hair, leather-and-brass field armor, and a long bow
Style/medium: moody fantasy tactics sprite illustration, painterly pixel-art-inspired, readable at small scale
Composition/framing: single full-body subject, centered, facing slightly left, feet planted, transparent background, tight sprite bounds
Lighting/mood: restrained ember-lit fantasy mood with controlled contrast
Color palette: moss green, worn leather brown, muted brass, warm skin tones, subtle ember warmth
Constraints: preserve identity, preserve outfit and weapon language, rendered around 100px tall in game, large readable shapes, simplified fine detail, crisp silhouette, no floor, no scenery, no text
Avoid: extra characters, extra weapons, glow spam, particles, photorealism, anime gloss, cinematic background
